title: eora cheesemanii
intro: Eora cheesemanii, also known as the Cheeseman's Eora or Cheeseman's Gardenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to New Zealand. The Eora cheesemanii plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Eora cheesemanii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
